checks.check: 1. SUBSTANCE FLOOR (RULE -1) — every tailored bullet retains all concretes of its canonical counterpart
checks.evidence: Every bullet text in the tailored resume is byte-identical to its canonical counterpart in jamie/resume.json. InGenius was only REORDERED (facilitation bullet lifted to top) — no clause/metric/markup dropped. All concretes survive: InGenius 600+/78%/70+/75%/25+/3-programs/20+/10+; NextGen 2,000+; ODN 300+/$362K; Vestas 12/23/3/1,000+; Kronos 566%. {kw|text} highlight markup fully preserved. This is exactly the failure mode RULE -1 was written to catch (Housecall thinning 2026-06-19) and it is NOT present here.

checks.check: 2. TRUTH / NO-RELABEL (RULE 0) — every claim traces to canonical; ODN=OD consulting; no invented tools/numbers; no banned Kronos line
checks.evidence: All bullets trace to canonical resume.json verbatim. ODN described as OD diagnostic consulting (leave-cost audit + NGO decision-making focus groups) — NOT community/ERG. No invented tools: skills block identical to canonical (no Jira/Articulate). No fabricated numbers. The banned '230+/80+/top-3-univ' Kronos composite is ABSENT (Kronos bullets are the 4 canonical ones, incl. real 566%). Cover claims all sourced.

checks.check: 3. NO CLICHÉS / NO JD-COPY-PASTE — Jamie's real words, not lifted JD phrasing or AI clichés
checks.evidence: Cover opens with a genuine belief sentence ('the best training does two things at once...'), uses warm first-person voice ('I'd rather measure whether a program worked than assume it did'), no generic AI clichés ('drove strategic transformation' etc.) and no verbatim JD vocabulary dumps. Resume summary re-angles the canonical L&D framing in her own words.

checks.check: 4. ODN TWO-PROJECTS not mixed in one bullet
checks.evidence: ODN bullet 1 (upskill HR / audit 300+ leave cases) and bullet 2 ($362K leave costs / policy redesigns) = Project 1 (leave-cost diagnosis). Bullet 3 (focus groups + 1:1 interviews with NGO leadership re: decision-making/accountability) = Project 2. No bullet blends the two projects. Identical to canonical separation.

checks.check: 5. BULLET COUNTS — ODN 2-3, every other experience exactly 4
checks.evidence: ODN = 3 bullets; InGenius = 4; NextGen = 4; Vestas = 4; Kronos = 4. Matches the fixed-count rule exactly.

checks.check: 6. COVER — warm/human voice; 'Dear Hiring Team,'; org-psych scientific-method close; keyword bolding incl company + metric; no relocation over-promise; no visa mention
checks.evidence: Salutation 'Dear Hiring Team,' present. Voice warm + human. Final para = explicit scientific-method/experiment close ('form a clear hypothesis, build the program, test it with the people closest to the work, and let the results shape the next version'). Bolds include company (**Housecall Pro**), employers (**InGenius Prep**/**NextGen Healthcare**/**ODN Oregon**), and metrics-with-number-inside-bold (**600+ participants**, **78% program enrollment rate**, **cut onboarding time by 75%**, **2,000+ employee experiences**, **$362K in leave costs**). No relocation over-commitment, no 'applied N days ago', no visa/sponsorship mention.

checks.check: 7. HONEST GAP — role needs not papered over with JD vocabulary
checks.evidence: Jamie genuinely owns both facilitation (600+ webinars) and development (guides/workflows/content) of training at InGenius, plus needs assessments — this is real, sourced overlap with a Training role, so no gap is being papered over. No fabricated 'instructional design' tooling or LMS-admin over-claim was inserted to fake a fit.

notes: MINOR (not a failure): summary tail reads 'through human-centered, data-driven approaches' vs §1's nominal fixed tail 'evidence-based approaches' — but this matches the master-resume canonical variant and 'data-driven' appears in the §1 model text itself; no substance lost.

MINOR (not a failure): InGenius bullet 1 keeps canonical phrasing '78% client conversion rate' while the cover uses the §9-default '78% program enrollment rate'. The resume matches its canonical source verbatim (substance floor satisfied); the cover uses the safer default. Both trace to the same real 78% figure. A tidy-up to align the resume to 'enrollment rate' for this non-sales Training role would be ideal but is not a quality/truth violation.
